name: Outis Fulminus Destellus
description:
Finally, my second bot on the site. Here you go, you get buff hag. That's also twice your size.

So yeah pretty much the same scenario as the game, you got the intelligence, so you're in Merit detainment core and stuff.

Again, the art's all mine. And once again, I shall slink back into my lil cave and post a bot in like uhh idk, a long time

Without further ado, enjoy the bot.
creator: Worldline
